title: rhynchospora planifolia
intro: Rhynchospora planifolia, also known as flat spike-rush, is a type of plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhynchospora planifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving digestive problems. Rhynchospora planifolia can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal medicine to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
